title: <div>   * Review Group Chat: Quickly scan the #Daily-Job-Updates channel to get
content:
* Review Group Chat: Quickly scan the #Daily-Job-Updates channel to get a high-level overview of yesterday's progress and any immediate flags.
* Review Master Request Log (Google Sheet): This is the most critical step.
* Filter the sheet to show only "Pending" requests for today/tomorrow.
* Prioritize "Urgent" requests.
* Consolidate procurement lists.
* Assign who will pick up what and for which job.
* Update the "Status" column as items are being addressed.
* Morning Briefing/Huddle (Quick):
* If all teams meet at the office: A quick 5-10 minute huddle where you go over the day's consolidated supply run, any critical updates, and confirm who is doing what.
* If teams go straight to job sites: A quick virtual huddle via the group chat (or a quick phone call to team leads). Announce: "Supply run consolidated, John is getting X for Job A, Maria is getting Y for Job B. Confirm receipt when delivered."
Overarching Principles for Success:
* Start Simple and Iterate: Don't try to implement everything perfectly on day one. Get the basic systems working, gather feedback from your employees, and then refine them.
